## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based off `develop`, not `main`.
- [ ] All CI checks pass.
- [ ] I have not added any comments to the code.
- [ ] I have not left any placeholder, stub, or TODO code.
- [ ] I have not raised the minimum supported OS version for any platform.
- [ ] I have updated `docs/CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format.
- [ ] I have read `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md` in full.
